http://www.lungusa.org/stop-smoking/about-smoking/facts-figures/hispanics-and-tobacco-use.html

https://doi.org/10.1111/birt.12199
PubMed

https://www.cdc.gov/nchs/fastats/hispanic-health.htm

https://www.cdc.gov/health-disparities-hiv-std-tb-hepatitis/populations/hispanic-latino.html

https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/puerto-rico/

Diaz L (2012) A structuralist analysis of Puerto Rican Santería.
http://future-nonstop.org/c/b684d 4ce0746140c 5c08714153843d32

https://doi.org/10.15766/mep_2374-8265.10984
PubMed

MMWR Morb Mortal Wkly Rep 64(17):469–478 PubMed
PubMedCentral

https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2018-05-11/where-puerto-rico-s-residents-migrated-since-maria

https://doi.org/10.1080/15332640.2014.1002878

https://doi.org/10.1017/S1041610220000848

https://www.pewresearch.org/short-reads/2023/08/16/11-facts-about-hispanic-origin-groups-in-the-us/

https://doi.org/10.1007/s11199-006-9083-2
